title: ICE 2: Immersive Clinical Experience
description: A high-fidelity VR medical simulation for UBC Faculty of Medicine featuring hand-tracking and voice-activated dictation to train emergency decision-making.

title: Brave VR: Where the Wind Leads
description: A hands-free VR experience for pediatric healthcare designed to prepare children for medical procedures through immersive and courageous storytelling.

title: ShroomVenture
description: A Ghibli-inspired 3D exploration game built with Unreal Engine where players forage supernatural fungi in a meditative, stylized forest environment.

title: Interactive Environment Shader
description: An experimental Unity ecosystem where custom vertex shaders allow foliage to respond dynamically to real-time user gaze and breath input.

title: Eco-Gesture: Textile Recycling
description: A gesture-controlled installation using Unity and Mediapipe that gamifies textile recycling through real-time computer vision and controller-free interaction.

title: Viral Fan Made Motion Art: Miside
description: A viral character animation project with over 3 million views, featuring custom digital illustrations and complex puppet-based VFX created in After Effects.

title: GunCat
description: A high-octane 2D arcade shooter built from scratch with a custom C++/OpenGL rendering pipeline and original hand-drawn pixel art.
